title: Resolution Extending the Effectivity of 2021-256, Thereby Moving the Day and Time of Regular Session of the Sangguniang Bayan of Los Baños From Monday, 9:00 A.m. to Tuesday, 3:00 Pm for the Month of February 2022 to Be Held at the Sangguniang Bayan Session Hall. (AUTHOR : COUNCILOR JANOS S. LAPIZ, 01/25/2022)
